title: Cold Email Infrastructure for Sales Teams — Scale Outbound Without the Technical Overhead
description: Learn how B2B sales teams use ColdRelay's dedicated cold email infrastructure to increase meeting volume, protect company domains, and let SDRs focus on selling instead of managing email ops.

painPoints.title: Why Sales Teams Need Dedicated Cold Email Infrastructure
painPoints.content:
B2B sales teams know that outbound email is the most scalable prospecting channel. But as teams grow from 2-3 SDRs to 10-20+, the infrastructure challenges compound:

**Company domain risk is a leadership issue.** When the VP of Sales asks IT to set up 200 mailboxes for cold outreach on the company domain, IT says no — and rightfully so. One deliverability incident affects the entire company's email: marketing, support, executive communication, everything.

**SDR time on email ops is selling time lost.** Every hour an SDR spends troubleshooting deliverability, managing warmup, or rotating mailboxes is an hour they're not booking meetings. At SDR costs of $50,000-80,000/year, infrastructure friction is expensive.

**Scaling SDRs requires scaling infrastructure.** Hiring 5 new SDRs means provisioning 50-125 new mailboxes (10-25 per SDR), configuring domains, setting up DNS, and managing warmup — a process that takes weeks if done manually.

**Inconsistent infrastructure creates inconsistent results.** Some SDRs have well-configured mailboxes with great deliverability. Others have poorly configured accounts that land in spam. Without standardized infrastructure, pipeline metrics are unreliable.

**RevOps is drowning in email operations.** Revenue Operations teams should be optimizing sales processes and building dashboards, not managing DNS records and mailbox rotations. Email infrastructure consumes RevOps bandwidth that should go toward revenue.

**Budget scrutiny is increasing.** CFOs are looking at every line item. Paying $7.20/mailbox on Google Workspace for 500 sending accounts ($3,600/month) when cheaper alternatives exist raises questions during budget reviews.

solution.title: How ColdRelay Solves Sales Team Infrastructure Challenges
solution.content: ColdRelay provides sales teams with standardized, scalable email infrastructure that eliminates operational overhead. Every SDR gets the same quality infrastructure — dedicated IPs, isolated Azure tenants, and auto-configured DNS — so deliverability is consistent across the team. At $1/mailbox/month (dropping to $0.55 at 5,000+), running 500 mailboxes across a 20-SDR team costs $350-500/month instead of $3,600. No warmup means new SDR hires start prospecting on their first day, not their fourth week. The 99% inbox guarantee gives sales leadership a deliverability metric they can count on. And because ColdRelay handles all infrastructure, RevOps and SDRs focus on what they do best: closing pipeline.

howItWorks.title: Deploying ColdRelay for Your Sales Team

steps.title: Plan Mailbox Allocation
steps.content: Determine mailboxes per SDR based on target outreach volume. Most teams allocate 10-25 mailboxes per SDR (sending 3-5 emails each per day). A 10-SDR team needs 100-250 mailboxes across 2-3 domains.

steps.title: Order at Team Scale
steps.content: Place a single order for your entire team through ColdRelay's self-service portal. Volume pricing kicks in immediately — 200+ mailboxes at $0.85, 1,000+ at $0.70.

steps.title: Infrastructure Live in Hours
steps.content: ColdRelay provisions all mailboxes on dedicated Azure tenants with auto DNS in 2-4 hours. Entire team is ready to send the same day.

steps.title: Assign to Your Sending Platform
steps.content: Distribute mailboxes to SDRs within your sequencing tool (Instantly, Smartlead, Outreach, Apollo, etc.). Each SDR gets their allocation with standardized deliverability.

steps.title: Onboard New SDRs Instantly
steps.content: When you hire new SDRs, add mailboxes to your existing infrastructure. New reps start prospecting on day one — no warmup wait, no configuration delay.

benefits.title: Benefits for Sales Teams Using ColdRelay

items.title: Protect the Company Domain
items.content: All cold outreach runs on dedicated infrastructure completely separate from corporate email. Marketing, support, executive, and client communications are never at risk from outbound activity.

items.title: Standardized SDR Infrastructure
items.content: Every SDR gets the same quality infrastructure — dedicated IPs, proper authentication, isolated tenants. No more performance variations from inconsistent mailbox quality.

items.title: New SDR = Same-Day Sending
items.content: New hire starts Monday? Their mailboxes are provisioned and ready Monday morning. No warmup period means new reps generate pipeline from their first week.

items.title: RevOps Freed from Email Ops
items.content: ColdRelay handles DNS, authentication, deliverability, and infrastructure management. RevOps focuses on process optimization, reporting, and revenue — not SPF records.

items.title: Budget-Friendly at Scale
items.content: 500 mailboxes at ColdRelay costs $350/month (at $0.70/mailbox for 1,000+ tier including team buffer). The same on Google Workspace: $3,600/month. Annual savings: $39,000.

faqs.question: How many mailboxes does each SDR need?
faqs.answer: Most teams allocate 10-25 mailboxes per SDR. At 3-5 emails per mailbox per day, that's 30-125 emails per SDR per day. Start with 15 per SDR and adjust based on your target volume.

faqs.question: Can we use ColdRelay with Outreach, Apollo, or Salesloft?
faqs.answer: Yes. ColdRelay mailboxes support SMTP/IMAP and work with any sending platform that supports standard email protocols — Outreach, Apollo, Salesloft, Instantly, Smartlead, and more.

faqs.question: Who manages the ColdRelay infrastructure?
faqs.answer: Typically RevOps or SDR management. ColdRelay's self-service portal and auto DNS mean no technical skills are needed. Ordering and assigning mailboxes takes minutes, not hours.

faqs.question: What happens when an SDR leaves?
faqs.answer: Reassign their mailboxes to a new rep or shut them down. ColdRelay's monthly billing means you only pay for active mailboxes. No penalties for scaling down.

faqs.question: Can different SDRs have different domains?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can organize mailboxes by SDR, territory, ICP, or product line — each on separate domains for reputation isolation. ColdRelay's pricing is per-mailbox regardless of domain distribution.
